text:
10. Loans to Director etc. under section 185.-(1) Any loan made by a holding company to its wholly owned
subsidiary company or any guarantee given or security provided by a holding company in respect of any loan
made to its wholly owned subsidiary company is exempted from the requirements under this section; and
(2) Any guarantee given or security provided by a holding company in respect of loan made by any bank or
financial institution to its subsidiary company is exempted from the requirements under this section:
Provided that such loans made under sub-rule(1) and (2) are utilised by the subsidiary company for its
principle business activities.
